name: P90 | 芥子气
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. A blue-green base coat has been finished with a yellow hydrographic \"ground smoke\" pattern. Denying information is as important as obtaining it
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 青绿基底上进行了黄霾涂装。 掩盖信息与获取情报同等重要
